item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.
notes: Both agents consistently reject the statement from their first to final turns. Each allows narrow, clearly justified limits on individual rights to prevent direct harm, but neither visibly moves toward prioritizing society over individual rights. Agent B explicitly references Agent A's concern about abuse under the phrase "demi kebaikan bersama"; Agent A similarly continues the public-good-abuse frame after Agent B's turn.
